title: Optimize elimination of assignments to dead variables

features.name: nonblocking_swap_in_clock_domains
features.description: Code should include two non-blocking assignments in clocked always blocks where signals swap values (a <= b and b <= a)
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk) a <= b;
always @(posedge clk) b <= a;

features.name: dead_assignment_after_reassignment
features.description: Code should include consecutive assignments to the same variable where a later assignment renders an earlier assignment dead
